Please complete the end-of-quarter [course
evaluations](https://eval.ucdavis.edu/) for both the Instructor and TA.
Teaching Evaluations are an important part of our portfolios for [job
applications](https://epiresearch.org/membership/ser-careers/) and
[promotions](https://caes.ucdavis.edu/node/4776). The **deadline** for
these evaluations is **before** **finals week**; please don't miss it!
